name: Footstep (Stone)
description: a crisp tap of a step on stone or pavement
usage: Per-step while walking on stone/path tiles.

ai.prompt: A single footstep on stone pavement: a crisp, hard leather-on-stone tap with a tight natural room, close and clean. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.

variation.note: repeating sound — game MUST round-robin + jitter every play
